full_text:
Huang Chong 黃崇
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Chong (黃崇). Advised Zhuge Zhan to seize the high ground but was ignored. Killed by his soldiers. Huang Chong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Huang Chong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
